evals.name: segmented-qa-flow
evals.prompt: 开始一个关于「添加通知系统」功能的头脑风暴。使用分段问答模式，每次只提问一个关键问题，等待回答后继续。
expectations: Should ask exactly one focused question per round
Should use clearly segmented sections in the output
Should reference previous answers in subsequent questions

evals.name: summary-generation
evals.prompt: 头脑风暴讨论结束后，生成一份可执行的总结，包含所有确认的决策、待办事项和下一步行动。
expectations: Should summarize all decisions made during the discussion
Should include concrete actionable next steps
Should flag unresolved questions for future discussion
